final_text:
Martensite has a body-centered tetragonal (bct) structure → P-3.  
Cementite (Fe₃C) has an orthorhombic crystal structure → Q-4.  
Austenite is face-centered cubic (fcc) → R-2.  
Ferrite is body-centered cubic (bcc) → S-1.  

Thus, the correct match is P-3, Q-4, R-2, S-1, which corresponds to option (C).

[ANSWER]C[/ANSWER]
